arts.ttl: Unwanted Chelsea star to make surprise return in Carabao Cup with Enzo Maresca 'hopeful'
arts.sum: Chelsea were looking to push England international Ben Chilwell through the exit door in the summer but he is now set to play some minutes in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Maresca confirms exiled player to return in EFL Cup against Barrow
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has confirmed that Chelsea left-back Ben Chilwell is set to return to the squad for the Blues EFL Cup match against League Two leaders Barrow on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea legend makes Jadon Sancho feelings clear with comment that speak volumes
arts.sum: Joe Cole believes on-loan Manchester United winger could be a missing ingredient for the Blues but he has to start delivering on a consistent basis in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Arsenal could play 16-year-old goalkeeper Jack Porter against Bolton with David Raya likely to be rested after picking up a knock at Man City and Pedro Neto cup tied
arts.sum: Arsenal could be forced to play 16-year-old rookie goalkeeper Jack Porter after David Raya limped off in Sunday's enthralling 2-2 draw against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Ben Chilwell set for Chelsea comeback in Carabao Cup tie against Barrow
arts.sum: The England international has not featured for the Blues since April.

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Barrow injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Chelsea and Barrow.

arts.ttl: Emergency talks held as £1bn hangs in balance for Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea will be watching with interest ahead of what have been described as ’emergency talks’ between some of the most important stakeholders in football. The...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca hands £100k-a-week man his last chance: Chelsea predicted XI vs Barrow in EFL Cup
arts.sum: Chelsea will be rotating heavily when they are back in action tomorrow night in the EFL Cup. Lower league Barrow are making the trip to...

arts.ttl: Report: What Victor Osimhen's agent is now doing ahead of January transfer window after failed Chelsea move
arts.sum: A switch to Stamford Bridge still looks possible.

arts.ttl: Star midfielder made 'best decision of career' after leaving Chelsea
arts.sum: Star midfielder made 'best decision of career' after leaving Chelsea Denis Zakaria is thriving at AS Monaco after his forgettable stints at Chelsea and Juventus .
